sessionStart.prompt: Dev-studio + advisory bootstrap. If PROJECT_BRIEF exists: (1) read BRIEF/CONSTITUTION/MANIFEST, (2) output engineering identity card in plain language for non-technical user, (3) recommend verify.ps1. For NEW features: run market-research-pipeline L1-L3 before coding unless user says skip. Use senior-tech-advisor for tech decisions in plain language. IL-37 is Claude Code only—do not edit. Input: $ARGUMENTS
